query: SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, st.id AS taskId, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS ePhotoSyncStatus, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncAttempts')) AS ePhotoSyncAttempts, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS ePhotoSyncMessage, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoFrontStorageUrl')) AS frontStorageUrl, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoBackStorageUrl')) AS backStorageUrl FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND p.batchNo LIKE '019%' AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_failed' ORDER BY p.batchNo LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.batchNo, p.sheetRowNumber, st.id AS taskId, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS ePhotoSyncStatus, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncAttempts')) AS ePhotoSyncAttempts, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS ePhotoSyncMessage, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoFrontStorageUrl')) AS frontStorageUrl, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoBackStorageUrl')) AS backStorageUrl FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND p.batchNo LIKE '019%' AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_failed' ORDER BY p.batchNo LIMIT 50;
